method.step_1: Represent each truck-day with stop-zone, GPS image, route distance, and fleet metadata.
method.step_2: Build stop-profile vectors and route-image clusters as evidence.
method.step_3: Ask the LLM to reason over statistical evidence and produce final pairwise truck correlations.
method.step_4: Normalize positive LLM-reasoned target-to-other correlations into truck appearance frequencies.
method.step_5: Sample target route clusters by target route frequency and other-truck routes by joint frequency.
method.truck_appearance_frequency: Positive target-to-other LLM-reasoned correlations normalized across other trucks.
method.route_appearance_frequency: Cluster days divided by selected period length.
method.joint_scenario_frequency: LLM truck appearance frequency multiplied by route appearance frequency.

1247.llm_rationale: 155 (Mobile_Eq) vs 1247 (Dril_Blast); purpose mismatch (0.0) is constraint. Stop-profile strong (0.71) shows both pass zones 4,7 regularly. Age similarity (0.39) and KMS moderate (0.57). 1247 operates ~152 km/day vs 155 at ~42 km/day. Duty cycle match (1.0).

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: 0.71 strong; both exhibit zone 4,7 dominance despite ~4-11 year age gap and purpose divergence.
llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: 0.036 low; 155 clusters 2,3 dominant vs 1247 clusters 3,2 dominant but with different weightings.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch (0.0); age divergent (11.75 vs 4.6 years); KMS similarity moderate (0.57); duty match (1.0).

1311.llm_rationale: 155 (Mobile_Eq) vs 1311 (Production); purpose mismatch (0.0). Negative stop-profile (-0.20) reflects distinct zone patterns: 155 passes zones 2,4,7 while 1311 passes zone 6 (3 times), zone 2 (1 time). Age similar (0.31), very strong KMS match (0.80) but insufficient to overcome purpose and zone divergence.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: -0.20 negative; 155 zones 2,4,7 vs 1311 zones 2,6. Distinct operational footprints.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch (0.0) critical; KMS very similar (0.80); age similar (0.31); duty match (1.0). Purpose gap dominates.

1312.llm_rationale: 155 (Mobile_Eq) vs 1312 (Production) differ in purpose (0.0) but exhibit strong stop-profile (0.71) and KMS similarity (0.80). 1312 operates ~285 km/day vs 155 at ~42 km/day. Both pass zones 4,7 heavily. Duty cycle match (1.0) provides baseline support.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: 0.71 indicates strong zone overlap at zones 4,7; cumulative passes in these zones show behavioral convergence despite role difference.
llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: 0.029 low; route cluster distributions diverge significantly (155 cluster 2,3 vs 1312 cluster 0,3).
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch (0.0) significant constraint; KMS near-identical (0.80) despite daily distance variance; duty match (1.0).

1350.llm_rationale: Both Mobile_Eq with young age (~3.7 years) and MEDIUM duty cycle. Strong KMS similarity (0.66) and purpose match (1.0). Stop-profile moderate (0.57) but zone patterns differ: 155 passes zones 2,4,7 sporadically; 1350 passes 4,6,7,8 more frequently. Route distributions vary.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: 0.57 reflects partial alignment; both operate in zones 4,7 but 1350 adds zone 6,8 intensity.
llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: 0.046 reflects cluster composition mismatch; 155 favors 2,3 while 1350 favors 2,4.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose match (1.0), age near-identical, KMS similar (0.66); duty_cycle match (1.0) supports pairing.

1363.llm_rationale: 155 (Mobile_Eq) vs 1363 (Rail); purpose mismatch (0.0). Moderate stop-profile (0.64) driven by zone 4,7 overlap; 1363 adds zone 3. Age similar (0.30). KMS dissimilar (0.24); 155 operates 42 km/day vs 1363 at 57 km/day. Duty match (1.0).

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: 0.64 moderate; both pass zones 4,7 but 1363 also uses zone 3 (2 passes vs 0).
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch (0.0); KMS very dissimilar (0.24); age similar (0.30); duty match (1.0).

1421.llm_rationale: Both Mobile_Eq, age ~3.7 years, MEDIUM duty cycle. Purpose match (1.0) and duty match (1.0) support pairing. Stop-profile moderate (0.49). 1421 operates ~168 km/day vs 155 at ~42 km/day, causing KMS similarity (0.68) despite cumulative mileage parity. Zone pass patterns moderate overlap.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: 0.49 indicates moderate zone-pass alignment; both use zones 4,7,8 but 155 infrequently.
llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: 0.045 reflects cluster distribution divergence; 1421 emphasizes cluster 1 (29%), 155 emphasizes 2,3 (52%).
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose match (1.0), age near-identical (3.18 vs 3.74 years), KMS similar (0.68); duty match (1.0).

1423.llm_rationale: 155 (Mobile_Eq) vs 1423 (Production); purpose mismatch (0.0). Negative stop-profile (-0.20) indicates distinct zone behavior: 155 passes zones 2,4,7 while 1423 rarely passes any zone (4 total: zone 6 x3, zone 7 x1). Very strong KMS match (0.78) insufficient. Age similar (0.32).

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: -0.20 negative; 155 regular zone passes vs 1423 minimal zone activity (4 total passes across 31 days).
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch (0.0) dominant constraint; KMS very similar (0.78); age similar (0.32); duty match (1.0). Purpose mismatch overrides metadata support.

1506.llm_rationale: 155 (Mobile_Eq) vs 1506 (Support/AMBULANCE); purpose mismatch (0.0) and duty mismatch (MEDIUM vs AMBULANCE, 0.0) are strong constraints. Stop-profile zero (0.0) despite different zone patterns. Route similarity moderate (0.19) cannot overcome multiple mismatches.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: 0.0 null alignment; 155 zones 2,4,7 vs 1506 zone 2 dominant (15 passes) with zone 7 (1 pass). Different operation model.
llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: 0.191 moderate; some cluster overlap but insufficient.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch (0.0), duty mismatch (0.0) are critical failures. Age similar (0.31), KMS moderate (0.34).

1575.llm_rationale: 155 (Mobile_Eq) vs 1575 (Production); purpose mismatch (0.0). Excellent KMS similarity (0.97) despite 155 being ~231k vs 1575 at ~238k cumulative. Stop-profile moderate (0.65). Both frequent zones 4,7,8. Duty match (1.0), age similar (0.27).

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: 0.65 moderate; zone patterns overlap at 4,7,8 but 1575 adds zone 8 intensity (3 passes).
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch (0.0); outstanding KMS similarity (0.97); age close (0.27); duty match (1.0).

1576.llm_rationale: Both Mobile_Eq trucks with similar age (~3.3 years), comparable duty cycle (MEDIUM), and matching zone patterns (zones 2,4,7). Stop-profile strong (0.63). Route similarity weak but consistent with their distinct operational ranges. KMS similarity moderate (0.51) reflects ~116k vs ~231k cumulative distance.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: 0.63 indicates convergent zone-pass behavior, especially in zones 4 and 7.
llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: 0.048 reflects different route cluster distributions; 155 clusters 2,3 dominant while 1576 clusters 3,4 dominant.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose match (1.0), age similarity (0.28), KMS similarity (0.51), duty_cycle match (1.0) all support behavioral alignment despite mileage variance.

1578.llm_rationale: 155 (Mobile_Eq) vs 1578 (Production); purpose mismatch (0.0) significant. Strong stop-profile (0.68) and very strong KMS similarity (0.82). 1578 operates ~331 km/day vs 155 at ~42 km/day. Both frequent zones 4,7. Duty cycle match (1.0).

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: 0.68 indicates convergent zone-pass behavior at zones 4,7; cumulative passes aligned despite role difference.
llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: 0.025 very low; cluster structures diverge significantly.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch (0.0) significant; KMS almost identical (0.82) despite daily distance variance; age similar (0.29); duty match (1.0).

1667.llm_rationale: 155 (Mobile_Eq) vs 1667 (Rail); purpose mismatch (0.0). Stop-profile zero (0.0) reflects 1667 no zone passes despite 31 observed days, while 155 passes 5 times across zones 2,4,7. Negligible operational overlap. KMS dissimilar (0.54). Age similar (0.24).

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: 0.0 null; 1667 recorded zero zone passes while 155 had 5 passes across zones 2,4,7. No behavioral convergence.
llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: 0.073 low; cluster distributions exist but zone data shows operational separation.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch (0.0); KMS moderate (0.54); age similar (0.24); duty match (1.0). Insufficient to overcome zero zone overlap.

1687.llm_rationale: 155 (Mobile_Eq) vs 1687 (Production); purpose mismatch (0.0). Weak stop-profile (0.45). 1687 operates ~62 km/day vs 155 at ~42 km/day (both low-intensity). KMS dissimilar (0.31). 1687 concentrates zone 7 (3 passes) with minimal zone 2,4 activity, diverging from 155's pattern.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: 0.45 weak; zone patterns diverge; 155 passes zones 2,4,7 while 1687 heavily favors zone 7 only.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch (0.0); KMS dissimilar (0.31); age similar (0.28); duty match (1.0).

1688.llm_rationale: 155 (Mobile_Eq) vs 1688 (Mobile_Eq); same purpose (1.0) but negative stop-profile (-0.12) indicates strongly divergent zone behavior. 155 uses zones 2,4,7; 1688 exclusively passes zone 2 (13 passes, all weekday). Daily distances: 155 ~42 km vs 1688 ~103 km. Duty match (1.0) insufficient to overcome zone divergence.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: -0.12 strongly negative; 1688 concentrated zone 2 only while 155 diversified across 2,4,7. Fundamentally different operational territories.
llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: 0.120 moderate-high; cluster distributions partially overlap despite zone divergence.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose match (1.0); age identical (0.28); KMS similar (0.30); duty match (1.0). Stop-profile negativity overrides metadata support.

1785.llm_rationale: 155 (Mobile_Eq) vs 1785 (Mobile_Eq); same purpose (1.0) but negative stop-profile (-0.17) indicates strong divergence. 155 passes zones 2,4,7; 1785 uniquely concentrates zone 3 (9 passes, 8 weekday). Daily distance 155 ~42 km vs 1785 ~165 km. Different operational zones override shared purpose.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: -0.17 negative; 1785 zone 3 focus vs 155 zones 2,4,7. Distinct service territories.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose match (1.0); age similar (0.27); KMS moderate (0.52); duty match (1.0). Stop-profile divergence dominant.

1993.llm_rationale: 155 (Mobile_Eq) vs 1993 (Tech_services) have different purposes but very strong stop-profile correlation (0.86), suggesting convergent zone-pass patterns despite role mismatch. Both operate ~30-40 km/day average, zones 2,4,7 patterns overlap. Age and KMS dissimilar but duty_cycle match (MEDIUM).

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: 0.86 is high despite purpose mismatch; both trucks pass zones 2,4,7 regularly, indicating shared service territories.
llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: 0.051 reflects different route cluster emphasis; operational territories overlap but route structures differ.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch (0.0) suppresses total; age (0.23) and KMS (0.37) similarities weak; duty_cycle match (1.0) helps.

2191.llm_rationale: 155 (Mobile_Eq) vs 2191 (Production); purpose mismatch (0.0). Moderate stop-profile (0.63) driven by zone 4,7 overlap. Strong KMS similarity (0.82). 2191 operates ~284 km/day vs 155 at ~42 km/day. Age similar (0.23). Duty match (1.0).

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: 0.63 moderate; both frequent zones 4,7 but 2191 shows higher pass counts.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch (0.0); KMS very similar (0.82); age similar (0.23); duty match (1.0).

2201.llm_rationale: 155 (Mobile_Eq) vs 2201 (Tech_services); purpose mismatch (0.0). Strong stop-profile (0.74) reflects overlapping zone patterns at 2,4,7. Both operate 76-92 km/day (distance medians similar). Age (0.24) and KMS (0.33) dissimilarity. Duty match (1.0).

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: 0.74 strong despite role mismatch; both pass zones 2,4,7 regularly with similar intensity patterns.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch (0.0); KMS dissimilar (0.33) but daily distance medians closer (39.9 vs 92.2 km); age dissimilar (0.24); duty match (1.0).

2518.llm_rationale: 155 (Mobile_Eq) vs 2518 (Dril_Blast); purpose mismatch (0.0). Strong stop-profile (0.74) driven by zone 4,7 overlap. 2518 operates ~152 km/day vs 155 at ~42 km/day. KMS and age dissimilarity (0.39, 0.21). Duty match (1.0).

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: 0.74 strong; both pass zones 4,7 regularly despite age/role differences.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch (0.0); age very dissimilar (0.21); KMS moderate (0.39); duty match (1.0).

final_scenario.sampling_method: For each scenario day, sample the target truck route from its own route_appearance_frequency, then sample one other truck route from joint_scenario_frequency = truck_appearance_frequency * route_appearance_frequency.
